content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09B_temp` for all records where the tour starts with `J09B`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has less than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA`; else set it to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09B_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09B`. Use exactly these column names:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached. Use `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09B_temp` for all records where the tour starts with `J09B`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has less than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA`; else set it to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09B_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09B`. Use exactly these column names:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached. Use `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

args.sql_query: SELECT e.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", j.HAUS AS HAUS, j.ANLAGE AS ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID AS ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR AS EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1 AS HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.TITLE ELSE n.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.FORENAME ELSE n.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.SURNAME ELSE n.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.STREET ELSE n.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.STREETNO ELSE n.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.POST_CODE1 ELSE n.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.CITY1 ELSE n.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.CITY2 ELSE n.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN COALESCE(TRIM(s.TITLE),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.FORENAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.SURNAME),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREET),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.STREETNO),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY1),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.CITY2),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(s.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(TRIM(s.EMAIL),'') <> '' THEN s.EMAIL ELSE n.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp j LEFT JOIN eablg e ON j.ANLAGE = e.Installation LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON j.EQUNR = s.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master n ON j.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
